skill1.kitLine: On Full Burst entry, self: ATK ▲ 160% for 3 sec.
On Full Charge attack landing on a target's core, self: Attack Damage ▲ 20.83% for 60 sec.
skill1.note: Trigger approximated as shotFired+requiresCore rather than literal core-full-charge; note assumes SR steady-state core hits. Inert at core-rate 0; 60s duration keeps it up under any core exposure (matches in-game).

skill1.kitLine: On Full Charge attack, target: 40.5% of final ATK as additional damage. Activates 5 times.
skill1.note: 5 hits × 40.5% consolidated to one 202.5% flatDamage (user-confirmed reading; single-hit read was 0.70 cold). noRange = Q1 calibration: procs exempt from +30% range and +50% full-burst majors (calibrated vs 2 scope-lock runs; mechanism unconfirmed).

skill1.kitLine: On Full Burst entry, the 1 Burst-3 ally with lowest final ATK: Charge Speed ▲ 12.74% of the skill user's Charge Speed for 10 sec.
skill1.where: skill1[3] (fullBurstEnter→alliesLowestAtk count 1 burst III excludeSelf, buff chargeSpeedPct 12.74 / 10s)
skill1.note: FIXED in review: now lowest-ATK B3 ally (was mis-parsed top-3). excludeSelf encodes her S2 self-immunity. '12.74% of the skill user's Charge Speed' modeled as flat chargeSpeedPct 12.74 (relative-to-caster nuance not separately modeled; not flagged by author).

skill2.kitLine: On Full Charge vs the stage target, self: Raging Current — Attack Damage ▲ 231% continuously. Removes Gentle Current.
skill2.note: Solo-raid single boss = always the stage target, so Raging Current is permanently active → modeled as a continuous passive.

skill2.kitLine: On Full Charge vs a Rapture that is NOT the stage target, self: Gentle Current — fixes charge time at 1 sec continuously. Removes Raging Current.
skill2.note: Inert in scope: solo-raid boss is always the stage target, so this branch can never fire.

skill2.kitLine: At battle start, self: immunity to Increase Charge Speed effects and to Decrease Charge Speed effects (continuous, unremovable).
skill2.note: Defensive/inert vs the sim's own buffs EXCEPT it is only enforced against her OWN S1 buff via excludeSelf; external teammate charge-speed buffs are NOT blocked (see confounds).

burst.note: Faithful; materialized 2026-07-16 from offline parser, behavior-identical to prior runtime parse.

burst.kitLine: All enemies: 925% of final ATK as additional damage.
burst.note: Target kind 'enemy' (single) vs prose 'all enemies' — equivalent in solo raid (single boss). Faithful.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 Gentle Current (charge time fixed at 1s vs non-stage-target Raptures) not modeled.
documentedConfounds.why: Solo-raid boss is always the stage target, so Raging Current is permanent and Gentle Current can never fire — zero in-scope impact.

documentedConfounds.text: Charge-speed immunity only enforced vs her OWN S1 buff (excludeSelf); an EXTERNAL Charge Speed buff from a teammate (Maxwell, Alice) would wrongly speed her up in the sim.
documentedConfounds.why: In teams with external charge-speed buffers the sim over-cycles her (more shots/procs) → over-predicts her damage. Dormant until paired with such buffers; ks finding F2 confirms engine sums all charge-speed at sim.ts:1522.

documentedConfounds.text: Q1 CALIBRATED (flagged for manual review): the 202.5% core-hit procs are exempt from the +30% range and +50% full-burst majors; calibrated vs two scope-lock runs (T1 1.16→1.00, T5 1.25→1.10); mechanism unconfirmed (user researching).
documentedConfounds.why: Calibrated to match measurement (reduces gap), but the underlying mechanic is unconfirmed — a measured fudge, not a derived rule. Risk if the real exemption differs across comps.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 20.83% Attack Damage rider is core-hit-gated via requiresCore — inert at core-rate 0; at any core exposure the 60s duration keeps it up.
documentedConfounds.why: Matches in-game steady state for an SR; correctly off when no core, correctly up under sustained core hits.

documentedConfounds.text: Q8 autofire / noBoltRecovery removed: chargeFrames reflect the full validated cycle (kit-fixed 1.2s / DB 90f), resolving from datamined input_type='DOWN_Charge'.
documentedConfounds.why: Resolved against datamine; no live gap.

documentedConfounds.text: noFb REMOVED from the 202.5 proc (panel-accepted): flag was a Q1 calibration-era relic contradicting the datamined U1 rule (function damage takes FB by actual landing timing; cast-instant rule is burst-slot-scoped). noRange stays (datamine-confirmed).
documentedConfounds.why: Resolved/accepted against datamine; post-landing MEASURED verification (liberalio-focus) materialized 2026-07-16.

authorIntentSummary: The author models Liberalio as a solo-raid SR attacker: S2's Raging Current is a permanent +231% Attack Damage passive (single boss = always the stage target, so Gentle Current is dropped as inert), S1 carries a Full-Burst ATK buff, a core-gated 20.83% Attack Damage rider (always-up under SR steady-state core hits), a consolidated 5×40.5%=202.5% flatDamage proc per full charge (noRange, Q1-calibrated to be exempt from range/full-burst majors), and a lowest-ATK B3-ally charge-speed buff with excludeSelf encoding her self-immunity. The burst (50%/10s self Attack Damage + 925% nuke) is faithful and materialized from the offline parser. Known-not-faithful spots: her charge-speed immunity is NOT enforced against external teammate buffs (a dormant HOT gap with charge-speed buffers), and the 202.5% proc's major-exemption is a measured calibration whose mechanism is still unconfirmed. Board reads 0.992 mean / MAD 0.102 over N=4 (OK), with one 1.19 outlier in an Electric-boss PG sweep.
